creator: timp87@gmail.com
text:
Sorry, looks like ${CHOWN} mustn't be in Makefile, but in pkg-plist as
@exec /usr/sbin/chown.
I think thats my final version =)



2014-02-27 13:27 GMT+04:00 Pavel Timofeev <timp87@gmail.com>:
